description_long: This marble sculpture features three intertwined human figures, each with exaggerated, rounded forms and expressive faces. The figures appear to be emerging from or partially fused with a rough, unfinished stone block, creating a dynamic contrast between the smooth, detailed anatomy and the raw, textured background. The central figure is positioned upright, with arms raised and bent behind the head, while the other two figures are arranged in a more horizontal orientation, their limbs interlocking. The surface of the sculpture is predominantly smooth on the figures, with visible chisel marks and a coarse finish on the uncarved stone. The base is flat and textured, providing stability and a sense of grounding. The overall composition suggests movement and struggle, with the figures' bodies twisting and pressing against each other.
description: A marble sculpture of three intertwined, muscular human figures emerging from a rough stone block, with smooth bodies contrasting against a textured background.
description_view_0: The front view shows all three figures clearly, with their limbs and faces prominently visible and the dynamic interaction between them most apparent.
description_view_1: The left side view emphasizes the profile of the central figure and the depth of the intertwined forms, with the rough stone block visible behind.
description_view_2: The rear view is dominated by the unfinished, textured stone, with only partial glimpses of the figures' limbs and heads protruding from the sides.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the muscular back and legs of the central figure, as well as the layered arrangement of the bodies against the stone.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the background is isolated and neutral.
